steps.title: Identify the variables and structure
steps.content:
The problem describes: payment is the original retail price minus \$135 for each year.

Breaking this down:
  • $p$ = payment in dollars
  • Original retail price = \$670
  • Deduction = \$135 per year
  • Years since release = $t$

steps.title: Translate the description into an equation
steps.content:
Original price minus \$135 for each year means: take $670$ and subtract $135t$.
$$p = 670 - 135t$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
